articles.author: Rod McGuirk
articles.title: Iranian agents lived in Australia before directing attacks on Sydney and Melbourne, spy chief says - AP News
articles.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guard used two agents who once lived in Australia to direct arson attacks against Jewish targets in Sydney and Melbourne, said Mike Burgess, director general of the Australian Security and Intelligence Organization. Iran was accused by th…
articles.content: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) Irans Revolutionary Guard used two agents who once lived in Australia to direct arson attacks against Jewish targets in Sydney and Melbourne, the head of Australias domestic… [+1849 chars]
